summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CLT Synapse ERP new features: Team-based Lead Filtering, Quick Stats Widget, Mentor Leaderboard, Commission Engine with Rules, Bank Reconciliation, and Editable Profile in Settings. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: Super Admin login successful
Backend: Team Leader login successful
Backend: Sales Executive login successful
Backend: Quick Stats API returns role-appropriate stats
Backend: Quick Stats includes unread_notifications field
Backend: Mentor Leaderboard API returns leaderboard data with total_mentors
Backend: Mentor Leaderboard with monthly period filter works
Backend: Mentor Leaderboard with all_time period works
Backend: Commission Rules GET returns list of rules
Backend: Commission Rules CREATE works correctly
Backend: Commission Rules UPDATE works correctly
Backend: Commission Rules DELETE works correctly
Backend: Reconciliation Summary returns expected fields (total_statements, pending_reconciliation, completed_statements, total_unmatched_lines)
Backend: Bank Statements list endpoint returns data
Backend: Get current user profile works
Backend: Update profile bio works
Backend: Update profile additional_phones works
Backend: Super admin sees all leads
Backend: Team leader lead filtering - sees only team's leads
Backend: Sales executive lead filtering - sees only own leads
Backend: Teams API lists all teams with member counts
Frontend: Login flow works correctly
Frontend: Home page shows Quick Stats Widget with role-appropriate data (Total Leads, New Today, Hot Leads, Enrolled MTD, Students, Pending Activation)
Frontend: Commission Engine page loads with stats cards
Frontend: Commission Engine has Commissions and Commission Rules tabs
Frontend: Commission Rules tab shows Add Rule button
Frontend: Create Commission Rule modal opens correctly
Frontend: Bank Reconciliation page loads with summary cards
Frontend: Bank Reconciliation has Import Statement button
Frontend: Mentor Leaderboard page loads with podium display
Frontend: Mentor Leaderboard shows Full Rankings table with correct columns
Frontend: Settings page loads with Profile, Appearance, Notifications, 3CX Integration sections
Frontend: Edit Profile button opens dialog
Frontend: Edit Profile dialog has photo upload, Full Name, Primary Phone, Additional Phone Numbers with + button, Bio textarea
Frontend: Additional phone numbers display as removable badges
Frontend: Sales CRM shows leads with proper team-based filtering
critical_code_review_comments: All new features implemented correctly and working end-to-end
Team-based lead filtering properly restricts visibility based on user role
Quick Stats Widget displays role-appropriate data on home launcher
Commission Engine with Rules tab provides full CRUD functionality
Bank Reconciliation page ready for statement import and reconciliation
Mentor Leaderboard shows rankings with proper scoring
Edit Profile allows updating bio and multiple phone numbers
seed_data_creation: Used existing test leads: TestLead TL (Mohammed Sanju), TestLead SE (Aleesha), TestLead Other (Rukaiyya). Commission rule TEST_Sales Executive Basic Commission created and deleted during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) Quick Stats Widget on home page shows role-appropriate stats (Total Leads, New Today, Hot Leads, etc.). 2) Commission Engine at /finance/clt/commission-engine has Commissions and Commission Rules tabs with full CRUD. 3) Bank Reconciliation at /finance/clt/reconciliation has Import Statement button and summary cards. 4) Mentor Leaderboard at /mentor/leaderboard shows podium and rankings table. 5) Settings page accessed via sidebar has Edit Profile with bio and additional phones. 6) Team-based lead filtering: Super admin sees all, Team leader sees team's leads, Sales exec sees own leads only.

features_verified.quick_stats_widget: Working - Shows Total Leads (4), New Today (3), Hot Leads (0), Enrolled MTD (1), Students (1), Pending Activation (1)
features_verified.commission_engine: Working - Stats cards, Commissions tab, Commission Rules tab with Add Rule button and CRUD
features_verified.bank_reconciliation: Working - Summary cards (Total Statements, Pending, Completed, Unmatched), Import Statement button, Bank Statements table
features_verified.mentor_leaderboard: Working - Podium display with 1st/2nd/3rd place, Full Rankings table with Rank, Mentor, Students, Active, Upgrades, Commission, Rating, Score columns
features_verified.settings_edit_profile: Working - Edit Profile button opens dialog with photo upload, Full Name, Primary Phone, Additional Phone Numbers (with + button and badges), Bio textarea
features_verified.team_lead_filtering: Working - Super admin sees all leads, Team leader sees team's leads only, Sales exec sees own leads only

ui_pages_tested: /welcome - Home launcher with Quick Stats Widget
